dublinCore.dc:title: 119 S3863 IS: Pay Less at the Pump Act of 2026
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

form.current-chamber: IN THE SENATE OF THE UNITED STATES

action.action-desc: Mr. Barrasso (for himself, Mr. Lankford, Mrs. Blackburn, Mr. Cornyn, Mr. Kennedy, Mr. Hoeven, Mr. Risch, Ms. Lummis, Mr. Cotton, and Mr. Lee) introduced the following bill; which was read twice and referred to the Committee on Finance

form.official-title: To amend the Internal Revenue Code of 1986 to terminate the Hazardous Substance Superfund financing rate.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Pay Less at the Pump Act of 2026.

section.header: Termination of Hazardous Substance Superfund financing rate

subsection.text: Section 4611 of the Internal Revenue Code of 1986 is amended by inserting after subsection (d) the following new subsection:

subsection.header: Application of Hazardous Substance Superfund financing rate
subsection.text: The Hazardous Substance Superfund financing rate under this section shall not apply after December 31, 2025.
Section 9507(d)(3)(B) of such Code is amended—

paragraph.text: by striking December 31, 2032 and inserting the date of the enactment of the Pay Less at the Pump Act of 2026, and
by striking on or before such date and inserting on a quarterly basis from unobligated amounts available in such Fund until repaid in full.
The amendment made by subsection (a) shall take effect on January 1, 2026.
The amendments made by subsection (b) shall take effect on the date of the enactment of this Act.
